text:
On Sat, 17 May 2014, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

If some ports person gets the patches sorted correctly, I'll approve
and bapt volunteered to take that port weeks ago after committing it
to head.  So please adjust the maintainer as well.

I guess it doesn't do staging yet either;-)
